case_title: LAURA HANDY VS. TRAVESSE LIFESTYLE LIMITED, A FOREIGN CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANDY, LAURA AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVESSE LIFESTYLE LIMITED, A FOREIGN CORPORATION TRAVESSE INC.
